What is externally proven: Proof center via /proof and Launch trust packet via /documents/launch-trust-packet and Reviewer telemetry packet via /documents/reviewer-telemetry-packet. Exact blocker: upgrade-authority-multisig. The startup-quality path remains blocked until production multisig, authority transfer signatures, and post-transfer readouts are recorded. Best demo route: open /start first. Lead with /start, then keep proof, custody truth, and the blocker in the same judge flow instead of splitting the story across routes.
